_comment: HAND-BUILT v2 findings fixture (Build 17). Shaped per docs/spec/04-researchers.md 'the contract' — FACTS + sources + coverage_notes only. NO read_through / thesis_bearing / priority (published) / section placement — those are the manager's to author. Facts grounded in docs/schema/sample-issue-hmbd-001-2026-07-18.json and docs/research/program-detective-source-set-2026.md; no invented competitors. priority_hint is the one within-aperture triage tag the contract allows.

findings.summary: An ESMO 2026 regular-abstract title referencing a patritumab deruxtecan (HER3-DXd) cohort posted on 17 Jul 2026. Only the title is public; the abstract text is embargoed to the autumn congress. HER3-DXd is a HER3-directed antibody-drug conjugate developed by Daiichi Sankyo and Merck & Co.

Context confirmed within window: Daiichi Sankyo and Merck & Co. voluntarily withdrew the HER3-DXd EGFR-mutant NSCLC BLA in May 2025 after the HERTHENA-Lung02 overall-survival miss; the broader program continues across roughly 15 tumour types. No refiling in this coverage window.

SDP0505 (SHR9265) is a first-in-class HER3 x c-Met bispecific antibody-drug conjugate in global Phase 2 for EGFR-TKI-resistant NSCLC, with a China BLA targeted for 2026. Primary movement registers on China's CDE and chictr.org.cn, which have no clean free feed and are language-gated; the finding is sourced from a journal review rather than a live registry diff.

proposed_entity.name: SDP0505 (SHR9265)
proposed_entity.what_it_is: First-in-class HER3 x c-Met bispecific ADC (Shengdi Pharmaceutical / Jiangsu Hengrui Pharma lineage), global Phase 2 in EGFR-TKI-resistant NSCLC.

coverage_notes.notes: No clinical mechanism twin (a HER3 antibody blocking the signalling node, same MOA as HMBD-001) surfaced this cycle; every moving HER3 competitor is an ADC or bispecific ADC — target twins. SDP0505 registry state is China-gated and carried at low confidence from a journal review, not a live CDE/chictr diff.
